# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Follow the repository rules in `AGENTS.md`.

Before coding:

- Read `README.md`
- Read `docs/llms.txt`
- Read `memory-bank/activeContext.md`
- Read `docs/dev-architecture.md`
- Do not implement backlog items unless explicitly assigned
- Do not implement gameplay mechanics until `docs/phase-2-core-loop-spec.md` is complete
- Run `npm run verify` before finishing
